goal: Reference solution for homework #3: add a second Franka ~1 m apart, fully articulated, saved.
thoughts: Two learning styles — give GUI click-path AND scripted version. Core gotcha: distinct prim path (Franka_01 vs Franka_02) because USD won't merge two references at the same path. Separate pose so they don't stack. Save the stage — the step students forget and TAs have to re-grade.
code:
# GUI path (handout bullet list):
# 1. Create menu → Add Reference, pick franka.usd, name it 'Franka_02'
# 2. Select /World/Franka_02, Property panel, set xform:translate=[1.0, 0, 0]
# 3. File → Save Stage

# Scripted equivalent (for CS-leaning students):
load_scene_template(template_name="<SINGLE_FRANKA_TABLETOP>")

add_reference(
    prim_path="/World/Franka_02",                  # distinct name — mandatory
    reference_path="<FRANKA_USD_ASSET>"
)
set_attribute(
    prim_path="/World/Franka_02",
    attr_name="xformOp:translate",
    value=[1.0, 0.0, 0.0]                           # 1 m apart
)

run_stage_analysis()   # assert 2 ArticulationRoots present
save_stage(stage_path="<STUDENT_HW3_USD>")

# Why distinct name: two prims at same path = USD composition collapses them.
failure_modes: Students give both references the same prim path — second silently merges
Forgetting save_stage — next launch loses the second arm
GUI copy-paste does NOT create a reference — it duplicates flattened
Placing both at origin — visually stacked, physics jitters
